header.banner: Introducing Achronyme — a language for zero-knowledge proofs. Read the announcement

hero.subtitle: A zero-knowledge language. Same syntax runs in a VM or compiles to arithmetic circuits.

sectionDual.title: Dual execution engine
sectionDual.subtitle: One language, two targets. No compromises.

featureVM.title: VM Mode
featureVM.desc: A real programming language with closures, recursion, mark-sweep GC, 37 opcodes, and 50 type methods. Build anything from binary search to cryptographic protocols.

featureCircuit.title: Circuit Mode
featureCircuit.desc: Same syntax compiles to R1CS or Plonkish constraints. Boolean propagation, constant folding, and taint analysis catch under-constrained bugs before proof generation.

sectionProofs.title: Proofs without the ceremony
sectionProofs.subtitle: Native Groth16 and PlonK provers. One binary, zero Node.js.

featureProve.title: First-Class Proofs
featureProve.desc: prove {} blocks return real proof objects. Chain them, extract components with proof_json(), verify inline with verify_proof(). Proofs are values, not CLI artifacts.

featureSolidity.title: On-Chain Verification
featureSolidity.desc: Export .r1cs and .wtns for snarkjs compatibility. Generate Solidity verifier contracts with --solidity. Deploy and verify proofs directly on Ethereum.

comparison.title: The difference
comparison.subtitle: Proving a Poseidon commitment: Circom + snarkjs vs Achronyme.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Real receipts, not promises. Versioned milestones, shipped commits, and what comes next.

items.multiPrimeDesc: Monomorphized constraint pipeline over F: FieldBackend. BN254, BLS12-381, and Goldilocks compile natively. 162 E2E cross-prime tests.
items.proveIRDesc: Pre-compiled circuit templates serialized in bytecode. prove {} blocks are first-class values.
items.solidityDesc: Export Groth16 verifier contracts for on-chain proof verification on Ethereum.
items.circomFrontendDesc: Import .circom templates and circomlib (Poseidon, MiMCSponge, EdDSA, BabyJubjub) directly. Constraint counts match circom O2 or beat it — Num2Bits 9 vs 17, LessThan 10 vs 20.
items.r1csOptimizerDesc: Frequency heuristic, tautological linear removal, Gaussian elimination, BN254 constant folding. EscalarMulAny 3.6x faster.
items.adversarialTestsDesc: Tests that try to forge proofs prove constraint deltas are real LC folding wins, not under-constrained bugs.
items.playgroundDesc: WASM-compiled compiler + VM running in the browser. Write, run, and prove circuits online — no install. WASM feasibility verified beta.16.
items.multiFieldVMDesc: VM runtime parameterized over FieldBackend. prove {} blocks use native field arithmetic for any curve.
items.starkBackendDesc: AIR constraint backend using Plonky3 for transparent STARK proofs over the Goldilocks field — no trusted setup.
items.noirFrontendDesc: Import Noir programs as ProveIR modules. Use existing Noir circuits inside Achronyme alongside Circom.
items.rustSDKDesc: Embed the Achronyme runtime in Rust apps via crate. Proc-macros, full interop. Targets Rust devs, not just ZK engineers.
items.apiFreezeDesc: Language specification freeze, backward compatibility guarantees, and stable bytecode format.

footer.tagline: A zero-knowledge DSL. Write code, generate proofs.
